recommendations.title: Brubaker
recommendations.overview: The new warden of a small prison farm in Arkansas tries to clean it up of corruption after initially posing as an inmate.

recommendations.title: The Pope of Greenwich Village
recommendations.overview: Charlie and his troublesome cousin Paulie decide to steal $150000 in order to back a "sure thing" race horse that Paulie has inside information on. The aftermath of the robbery gets them into serious trouble with the local Mafia boss and the corrupt

recommendations.title: Bronson
recommendations.overview: A young man who was sentenced to 7 years in prison for robbing a post office ends up spending 30 years in solitary confinement. During this time, his own personality is supplanted by his alter ego, Charles Bronson.

recommendations.title: The Amityville Horror
recommendations.overview: George Lutz, his wife Kathy, and their three children have just moved into a beautiful, and improbably cheap, Victorian mansion nestled in the sleepy coastal town of Amityville, Long Island. However, their dream home is concealing a horrific past and

recommendations.title: The Shawshank Redemption
recommendations.overview: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, D

recommendations.title: Island of Fire
recommendations.overview: Someone in a prison run by a corrupt warden fakes the deaths of convicts to later use them as expendable assassins. A police officer is sent into the prison to gather evidence of the corruption.

recommendations.title: The Drowning Pool

recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.

recommendations.title: Return of the Jedi

recommendations.title: A Prophet
